series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of but is not limited to, applications, renewal forms or correspondence associated with an appraisal management company license. These records may contain tax identification numbers which are not a matter of public record pursuant to 26 USC Section 6103 and Ohio Revised Code Section 149.43(A)(1)(dd).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper records are imaged and indexed a computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed properly ; Electronic: Any records imaged and indexed a machine readable format are be retained one year expiration of license and records are be destroyed. ; Microform: Any records on microform are be retained one year expiration of license and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
